flavorText: Artillerists turn their rigs into compact siege engines, pressure cannons, and explosive support platforms.

features.description: Deploy or shoulder a compact cannon module that projects force, flame, or concussive energy. The cannon gives the subclass a real ranged identity and should feel like a named battlefield tool rather than a generic damage rider.
You always have specialty explosive and protective formulae prepared as part of your artillery package.
Your power cells become more efficient, letting you sustain firing solutions for longer and hold accuracy under pressure.
Your devices reshape the battlefield with overlapping blast zones, cover-breaking force, and pressure that keeps enemies moving.
Your heaviest modules hit harder, reach farther, and become easier to bring online during decisive encounters.

artillerist-arc-cannon.summary: Anchor your subclass around a real weaponized device that projects repeatable battlefield pressure.
artillerist-arc-cannon.description: Arc Cannon is the subclass thesis statement. It should feel like you built a weapon system the rest of the party can play around, whether that means zone pressure, crackling force, or controlled blasts.
artillerist-arc-cannon.usage: Spend 1 Gadget Charge per cannon discharge.
artillerist-arc-cannon.recovery: Gadget Charges recharge on a long rest unless a feature says otherwise.

artillerist-bombardment-spells.summary: Gain always-ready explosive and defensive formulae that keep your subclass spell identity sharp.

artillerist-stabilized-battery.summary: Your firing rig wastes less power and keeps delivering pressure over longer fights.
artillerist-stabilized-battery.effect: When you spend Gadget Charges on artillery modules, you can keep one module online for an extra round.

artillerist-shatter-field.summary: Turn your deployed tech into an area-denial and cover-cracking toolset.
artillerist-shatter-field.usage: Spend 1 Gadget Charge to project a shatter zone.

artillerist-ordinance-mastery.summary: Your endgame artillery package becomes the loudest and most reliable answer in the room.
artillerist-ordinance-mastery.effect: Your heavy modules gain longer reach and stronger impact when overcharged.
